children.text: indicate the total amount of such contributions;

indicate the amount of contributions which is subject to reimbursement, which shall be equal to the total amount of contributions, unless one of the limitations contained in is applicable;section 4747 of this title
if one of the limitations in is applicable, provide documentation of the applicability of such limitation for each loan for which the limitation applies; andsection 4747 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the information provided in accordance with paragraphs (1), (2), and (3) is accurate;

children.label: B
children.text: funds in an amount meeting the minimum requirements of continue to be available and legally committed to contributions by the State to reserve funds, less any amount that has been contributed by the State to reserve funds subsequent to the State being approved for participation in the Program;section 4743(b)(3) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: there has been no unapproved amendment to any participation agreement or the form of participation agreements; and

children.label: D
children.text: the participating State is otherwise implementing the Program in accordance with this subchapter and regulations issued pursuant to .section 4749 of this title

children.heading: Annual data
children.label: b Annual data
children.text: Not later than March 31 of each year, each participating State shall submit to the Fund annual data indicating the number of borrowers financed under the Program, the total amount of covered loans, and breakdowns by industry type, loan size, annual sales, and number of employees of the borrowers financed.

children.heading: Form
children.label: c Form
children.text: The reports and data filed pursuant to subsections (a) and (b) shall be in such form as the Fund may require.
